description_long: This object is a rectangular medicine box with a predominantly white exterior, accented by blue and red design elements. The front face displays the product name 'Симбикорт' (Symbicort) in Cyrillic, along with a blue banner and a stylized logo of running figures with flags. The sides of the box feature detailed product information, including dosage, instructions, and a barcode. The top and bottom faces are mostly plain, with the top showing the same blue and red branding as the front. The box appears to be made of lightweight cardboard, typical for pharmaceutical packaging, and is likely to contain blister packs or an inhaler inside. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and designed for easy identification in a healthcare or pharmacy setting.
description: A white rectangular medicine box with blue and red branding, Cyrillic text, and a stylized running figures logo. The sides display product information and a barcode.
description_view_0: The front face of the box, showing the main branding, product name, and a red banner.
description_view_1: A side view with detailed product information and manufacturer details in Cyrillic text.
description_view_2: The back or top face, featuring a blue section with the product name and logo, mostly plain otherwise.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, displaying a barcode and additional product information.
